title: The Execution Platform Crisis
description: On pages 5–8, the execution platform crisis focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.
scene: On pages 5–8, the execution platform crisis focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see, a quarrel among the pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: S-Shall we give the order to fire?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But if we don't hurry, they'll...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Have I ever let pirates escape from this town,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Let the pirates kill each other.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It'll just mean less work for us.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Only after straw hat's head is sent flying,

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: will we round up buggy, alvida, and their pirate crews.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: As if I'd just let you go, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmph... this is only natural for all those who dare defy us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Has the man I so admired finally met his end...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: might as well make the most out of this large crowd.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Well, whatever. Whether you have any last words or not,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It ain't like anybody will care for what you have to s...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: saying that in this town out of all places...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Is that all you have to say... you rubber brat!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But it seems you're too late...!

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
